task: Task 4.3: Connect Offline Event Queue to Network Restoration

auditReport.task: Task 4.3: Connect Offline Event Queue to Network Restoration

features: Persistent queue with VS Code globalState storage
Methods: enqueue, dequeue, peek, isEmpty, getRetryDelay, shouldRetry

missingFeatures: NO network event listeners for 'online'/'offline' events
Background processor only runs every 30s, not on-demand on network restore

rootCause.problem: Network restoration event ('online') never triggers immediate queue processing
rootCause.currentBehavior: Queue drains on 30-second polling interval only
rootCause.expectedBehavior: Queue should process immediately when network is restored
rootCause.impact: Offline telemetry delayed up to 30 seconds, defeating the purpose of offline support

requiredChanges.action: Add setupNetworkMonitoring() method and call from constructor
Add optional logging in queue processing (optional enhancement)

existingUtilities: calculateBackoff() from @snapback/sdk - already used in OfflineEventQueue.getRetryDelay()
toError() from ../utils/errorHelpers - already imported in TelemetryProxy
logger from ../utils/logger - already imported in TelemetryProxy

canonicalLocations.existingPattern: Service layer handles network events and delegates to OfflineEventQueue (existing pattern matches requirement)

auditReport.auditConclusion: This is a HIGH-PRIORITY, HIGH-ROI integration task. Infrastructure is 100% complete and tested. Only missing: wiring network events to trigger queue processing. Expected implementation time: 30-60 minutes.

certification.statement: Task 4.3 completed through strict TDD. All phases passed with gate verification.
